# Prime Property Buyers

> UK direct cash house buyer. We buy properties in any condition, anywhere in
> England, using our own funds — no estate agents, no chains, no fees. We make a
> genuine cash offer direct to the seller and can complete in as little as 5 days,
> covering the legal costs.

Prime Property Buyers is the marketing name for UK National Properties Ltd
(registered in England, company no. 12973116). Buying property direct since 1993,
we have purchased thousands of homes. We are a principal cash buyer — we are not
a broker, lead-generator or estate agent, and we do not "find a buyer": we buy
the property ourselves.

## Key pages
- [Home — sell your house fast for cash](https://primepropertybuyers.uk/): how the direct cash purchase works, any condition, complete in ~5 days, legal fees covered.
- [Why choose us](https://primepropertybuyers.uk/why-us/): how a genuine cash buyer differs from estate agents and auctions, and what makes us different.
- [Important advice](https://primepropertybuyers.uk/important-advice/): how to spot and avoid cash-buyer scams, and what to check before you sell.
- [FAQs](https://primepropertybuyers.uk/faqs/): common questions on offer price, timescales, fees and the selling process.
- [Contact](https://primepropertybuyers.uk/contact/): phone, WhatsApp and enquiry form.

## Situations we help with
- [Sell your house fast](https://primepropertybuyers.uk/sell-your-house-fast/): a quick guaranteed sale when speed matters.
- [Selling an inherited / probate property](https://primepropertybuyers.uk/selling-inherited-property/): sell an inherited home, even if it needs work.
- [Stop repossession](https://primepropertybuyers.uk/stop-repossession/): a fast sale to clear mortgage arrears before a court date.
- [Selling a house after divorce or separation](https://primepropertybuyers.uk/selling-house-after-divorce/): a clean, quick split of the property.
- [Selling due to ill health or care needs](https://primepropertybuyers.uk/selling-house-due-illness/): release funds for care quickly and with minimal stress.
- [Selling to clear debt or financial difficulty](https://primepropertybuyers.uk/selling-house-pay-debt/): release equity fast to settle debts.
- [Selling a former buy-to-let](https://primepropertybuyers.uk/sell-former-buy-to-let/): exit a rental, tenanted or vacant, without the open market.
- [Modern Method of Auction](https://primepropertybuyers.uk/lp/modern-method-of-auction/): an alternative auction route explained.

- WhatsApp: +44 7719 138319
